---
title: "Chen Gao (高琛)"
pagetitle: "Chen Gao 高琛"
title-prefix: ""
image: img/profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:chengao0716@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ChennoShen239
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: files/cv.pdf
---

Welcome!

I am a senior undergraduate at the [National School of Development](https://en.nsd.pku.edu.cn/), Peking University. 

My research interests lie in **macroeconomics**, **monetary economics**, and **computational methods**, with a particular focus on heterogeneity. I enjoy combining structural modeling with data-driven approaches, and am especially interested in applying **machine learning** and **deep learning** to solve and estimate rich heterogeneous-agent models.

You can reach me at [chengao0716@gmail.com](mailto:chengao0716@gmail.com).

## Research

#### [Default with Policy-Randomness Overestimation](research.qmd)

When lenders overweight how unpredictable a government's policy is, the sovereign borrows less yet defaults at higher debt, producing a "stability illusion." [PDF](files/bounded_default.pdf)

#### Forecasting Inflation with Microdata: An Adaptive Machine Learning Approach

*Work in progress with [Catherine Chen](https://icme.stanford.edu/people/catherine-chen), [Jonathon Hazell](https://sites.google.com/view/jadhazell/home), [Lihua Lei](https://lihualei71.github.io/), and [Chen Lian](https://sites.google.com/view/chenlian/home).*

[Full abstracts & details →](research.qmd)

## News

- **Fall 2026.** Joining the [Centre for Macroeconomics](https://www.lse.ac.uk/CFM) at LSE as a research assistant.
- **October 2025.** New draft of my working paper, [*Default with Policy-Randomness Overestimation*](research.qmd).

## Education

- **B.A. in Economics**, Peking University, 2022–2026 (with Honors)
- **Visiting Undergraduate**, University of California, Berkeley, Spring 2025
